offer: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties, inconsistent compliance reporting causes missed inspections. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem: Inconsistent compliance reporting for property inspections
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers

Join community forums for property management tools

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
